details.test: Task 1: Save recent neonatal sepsis RCTs to Sepsis Review collection
Task 2: Bookmark CPAP vs IMV study with lowest 28-day mortality
Task 3: Add African maternal hypertension trial to Hypertension Trials watchlist
Task 4: Create and save VLBW incidence chart to NICU Planning dashboard
Task 5: Register account and create weekly NEC alert for North America
Task 6: Configure researcher profile specialties and preferences
Task 7: Add ACS systematic review to Thesis 2026 reading list with high priority
Task 8: Pin highest-volume NICU with >90% survival to discharge for 24–27 weeks
Task 9: Register for next-month KMC webinar between 10th–16th after 14:00
